prompt: Technical maintenance manual for a dragon, showing anatomical diagrams, feeding schedules, and troubleshooting charts in aviation manual format
prompt_refined: An open technical maintenance manual for a dragon, presented in the precise style of an aviation engineering handbook. The left page prominently displays a detailed, labeled anatomical diagram of the dragon. The right page features a structured feeding schedule in a table format at the top, and a clear troubleshooting flowchart for common dragon malfunctions below it. The manual's aesthetic is clean, highly technical, with monochromatic line art diagrams and crisp sans-serif text, similar to a real-world aircraft maintenance manual.
objects: Detailed anatomical diagram of a dragon on the left page
Structured feeding schedule in a table format on the top of the right page
Troubleshooting flowchart for dragon malfunctions below the feeding schedule on the right page
